- 
Have a condition such that leaving his or her home is medically 
contraindicated. 

If the patient meets one of the criterion one conditions, then the patient must ALSO meet 
two additional requirements defined in criterion two below. 

2. Criterion Two: 

- 
There must exist a normal inability to leave home; 

AND 

- 
Leaving home must require a considerable and taxing effort. 

To clarify, in determining whether the patient meets criterion two of the homebound 
definition, the clinician
